name: Gumdrop Fruitcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift and measure flour.
2. Add cinnamon, cloves, and salt; sift again. Set aside.
3. Cut gumdrops and add part of the dry ingredients to raisins. Mix well.
4. Add remaining gumdrops and chopped nuts to the raisin mixture; set aside.
5. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
6. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
7. Alternating with flour mixture, add applesauce slowly.
8. Dissolve baking soda in hot water.
9. Stir vanilla into the batter.
10. Fold in the raisin, gumdrop, and nut mixture.
11. Pour batter into 2 or 3 loaf pans lined with greased brown paper.
12. Bake at 300°F for about 2 hours.
